name: Chateau La Dominique
summary: Bookable Saint-Emilion château visit with modern architecture and strong visitor-facing infrastructure.
whyItMatters: A château visit adds vineyard context beyond village tastings, and La Dominique has an obvious official booking path.
pros: Official site describes exceptional wines, sustainable viticulture, and wine experiences in Saint-Emilion.
Official site exposes a clear 'Book a tour' link.
Food & Wine highlights La Dominique among Bordeaux wineries to visit.
cons: Official page did not expose clean hours in fetched HTML; booking system must be checked.

logistics.opening_hours: Needs verification in the official reservation system.
logistics.reservation_needed: Yes; official site links to reservation.chateau-ladominique.com.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until lodging/activity plan is fixed.
logistics.transit: Likely requires taxi/car from Saint-Emilion or Bordeaux; verify.
logistics.parking: Unknown; likely on-site but verify with booking.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No race-specific closure assumed; verify if visiting from Bordeaux around Stage 7.

timing.best_visit_window: Dedicated Saint-Emilion wine day with pre-booked tour slot.
timing.race_day_risk: Low to medium depending on whether travel crosses Bordeaux race operations.

sources.title: Chateau La Dominique official website
sources.note: Supports venue identity, Saint-Emilion wine-experience positioning, sustainable viticulture claim, and official tour booking path.

sources.note: Supports destination value for Bordeaux winery visiting and mentions Chateau La Dominique as a visitor-worthy property.
